languages.title: Basa
languages.subtitle: Pilih basa anu dianggo sapanjang aplikasi.
languages.noResults: Teu aya basa anu cocog sareng pamilarian anjeun.

phone.label: Nomer telepon
phone.searchCountry: Teangan nagara, kode, atawa awalan telepon
phone.noCountries: Teu aya nagara anu cocog sareng pamilarian anjeun.
phone.invalid: Asupkeun nomer telepon nu valid pikeun nagara nu dipilih.

auth.onboardingTagline: Saurang pendamping kaamanan pribadi pikeun momen antara "Abdi teu kunanaon" sareng "Abdi peryogi bantosan".
auth.createSubtitle: Pilih metode asup pikeun ngajaga grafik kaamanan anjeun.
auth.signInFailedMessage: Kami henteu tiasa ngalengkepan asup. Pariksa sambungan anjeun sarta cobian deui.
auth.googleUnavailableMessage: Maké sési pamekaran lokal. Native Google Sign-In dianggo dina wangunan pangwangunan.
auth.northStarSubtitle: Sapasangkeun ayeuna atanapi teraskeun teras tambahkeun engké.
auth.northStarBody: The VL01 wearable bisa memicu aliran kaamanan ku ketok jeung sapuan pencét lila.
auth.meetCapybearSubtitle: Rencangan kaamanan anu lembut anjeun dina peta sareng dina telepon.
auth.capybearBody: Capybear tiasa ngabantosan modeu bumi, mode wali, modeu darurat, telepon hapunten, sareng dukungan sora.

permissions.locationSubtitle: Dipaké pikeun peta, zona bahaya, kadatangan aman, sareng kontéks SOS.
permissions.locationBody: VeryLoving nyuhunkeun lokasi supados wali tiasa ngartos dimana peryogi bantosan. Anjeun tiasa ngarobih ieu engké dina Setélan.
permissions.notificationsSubtitle: Bewara ngadukung pamariksaan sareng acara darurat.
permissions.notificationsBody: Kami ngan ukur nganggo béwara pikeun paréntah kaamanan, apdet darurat, sareng panginget anu anjeun aktipkeun.
permissions.locationRationaleMessage: VeryLoving ngagunakeun lokasi anjeun pikeun peta kaamanan, zona bahaya, babagi gancang, jeung kontéks SOS. Anjeun tiasa ngarobih ieu engké dina Setélan.
permissions.notificationsRationaleMessage: VeryLoving ngirim panginget check-in, apdet darurat, sareng ajakan kaamanan anu anjeun aktipkeun. Kami henteu nganggo béwara pikeun iklan.
permissions.microphoneRationaleMessage: VeryLoving nganggo mikropon anjeun ngan ukur nalika anjeun ngamimitian telepon pendamping atanapi kaamanan AI.
permissions.bluetoothRationaleMessage: VeryLoving ngagunakeun Bluetooth pikeun masangkeun jeung NorthStar perhiasan, maca status sambungan, sarta memicu aliran kaamanan ti wearable.
permissions.cameraRationaleMessage: VeryLoving uses the camera only to scan the one-time pairing QR code on your home robot.

tutorial.sharedBody: VeryLoving ngajaga aliran ieu sadia ti Setélan jeung dasbor.
tutorial.chooseVoiceSubtitle: Pilih sora pendamping anu karasaeun paling aman pikeun didangu.
tutorial.guardianSubtitle: Bagikeun kontéks sareng jalma anu dipercaya.
tutorial.emergencySubtitle: Lima ketok bisa naék ka SOS jeung béja wali.
tutorial.excuseSubtitle: Jieun alesan anggun pikeun ninggalkeun kaayaan teu nyaman.
tutorial.safetyCallSubtitle: Mimitian telepon pendamping sacara real-time nalika anjeun peryogi pangrojong.
tutorial.practiceSubtitle: Coba aliran kaamanan dina demo tekanan-rendah.

jewelry.pairSubtitle: Simpen perhiasan di deukeutna bari nyeken.
jewelry.noDevices: Teu aya alat NorthStar caket dieu acan kapanggih.
jewelry.scanStartFailed: Bluetooth panyeken teu bisa dimimitian. Mangga cobian deui.
jewelry.scanFailed: Kami henteu mendakan perhiasan caket dieu. Pariksa Bluetooth, tutup NorthStar, teras cobian deui.
jewelry.scanAccessFailed: Bluetooth panyeken teu bisa dimimitian. Pariksa aksés Bluetooth teras cobian deui.
jewelry.permissionDenied: Akses alat-deukeut pareum. Idinan Bluetooth aksés dina Setélan, teras cobian deui.
jewelry.connectTimeout: NorthStar lila teuing pikeun nyambung. Pindahkeunana ngadeukeutan teras cobian deui.
jewelry.connectFailed: Kami teu bisa nyambung ka NorthStar. Pariksa yén éta dieusi sareng caket dieu, teras cobian deui.
jewelry.emptyMessage: Simpen NorthStar dicas sareng caket kana telepon ieu, teras seken deui.

home.subtitle: Dasbor pendamping kaamanan
home.readyBody: Sora, peta, perhiasan, jeung wali ngan saukur ketok.

map.title: Peta kaamanan
map.previewSubtitle: Expo Go sawangan; Mapbox renders dina wangunan pangwangunan.
map.updateFailed: Kami henteu tiasa ngamutahirkeun lokasi anjeun. Mangga cobian deui.
map.notRequested: Akses lokasi henteu dipénta. Anjeun tiasa ngaktipkeun engké tina Setélan.
map.permissionOff: Akses lokasi pareum. Aktipkeun dina Setélan pikeun museur peta kaamanan ka anjeun.
map.timeout: Lokasi anjeun langkung lami tibatan anu disangka. Pindah ka tempat anu sinyalna langkung jelas sareng cobian deui.
map.savedEmptyMessage: Tempat dipercaya anu anjeun simpen bakal muncul di dieu pikeun aksés gancang.
map.geofenceEntered: You entered the %{radius}m saved-place safety zone.
map.geofenceExited: You left the %{radius}m saved-place safety zone.

safetyCall.connectingSecurely: Nyambungkeun aman ka pasangan sora anjeun...
safetyCall.emptyMessage: Mimitian telepon atawa ketik talatah sawaktos Anjeun tos siap.

history.clearMessage: Ieu ngahapus AI talatah pendamping anu disimpen tina alat ieu.
history.title: Riwayat paguneman
history.subtitle: AI talatah pendamping disimpen dina alat ieu.
history.emptyMessage: Paguneman pendamping AI anjeun bakal muncul di dieu saatos telepon munggaran anjeun.
history.loadFailed: Kami henteu tiasa ngamuat riwayat paguneman. Mangga cobian deui.
history.clearFailed: Kami henteu tiasa mupus sajarah paguneman. Mangga cobian deui.
history.deleteFailed: Kami henteu tiasa ngahapus paguneman éta. Mangga cobian deui.

voices.title: Sora telepon kaamanan kuring
voices.subtitle: Pilih sora pendamping anu karasaeun pas didangukeun.
voices.sampleFailedMessage: Sampel sora ieu teu bisa diputer. Mangga cobian deui.

settings.offlineModeSubtitle: Paké réspon pendamping anu dibuntel lamun jaringan atawa Hume kredensial teu sadia.
settings.privacyBody: Ékspor atawa pupus data lokal nu disimpen dina alat ieu.
settings.exportFailedMessage: Teu tiasa ngékspor data anjeun ayeuna.
settings.deleteConfirmMessage: Ieu miceun profil anjeun, setelan, kontak darurat, riwayat paguneman, panginget idin, sareng sesi otentikasi lokal tina alat ieu.
settings.deleteFailedMessage: Teu tiasa ngahapus data lokal ayeuna.
settings.updateFailedMessage: Kami henteu tiasa nyimpen karesep éta. Mangga cobian deui.
settings.signOutFailedMessage: Sesi anjeun masih aktip. Mangga cobian deui.

contacts.title: Kontak darurat
contacts.subtitle: Jalma anu dipercaya sayogi salami aliran kaamanan.
contacts.name: Ngaran
contacts.emptyMessage: Tambihkeun batur anu anjeun percanten supados aranjeunna siap nalika aliran kaamanan butuh aranjeunna.
contacts.removeMessage: Jalma ieu moal muncul deui dina aliran darurat anjeun.
contacts.saveFailedMessage: Kami henteu tiasa nyimpen kontak ieu. Pariksa detil na cobian deui.
contacts.removeFailedMessage: Kami henteu tiasa ngahapus kontak ieu. Mangga cobian deui.

friends.title: Baturan
friends.subtitle: Penjaga, pamundut, sareng grafik darurat.
friends.emptyMessage: Babaturan sareng wali anu dipercaya bakal muncul di dieu saatos aranjeunna ditambahkeun.

emergency.title: Darurat SOS
emergency.subtitle: Escalate ngan lamun anjeun peryogi rojongan langsung.
emergency.body: Ieu bakal ngabéjaan aliran kaamanan anjeun sareng nyiapkeun kontak darurat.
emergency.quickShareMessage: Stub babagi lokasi tos siap. Sambungkeun titik tungtung bagikeun backend pikeun ngirim tautan langsung.

capybearTap.title: Capybear ketok
capybearTap.subtitle: Ketok dua kali NorthStar anjeun pikeun neundeun jeruk kaamanan.
capybearTap.body: Jalur sapuan geus siap pikeun wiring acara BLE.

errors.voiceOffline: Anjeun sigana offline. Pesen anjeun bakal dikirim nalika anjeun nyambung deui.
errors.voiceQueued: Pesen disimpen. Ieu bakal dikirim nalika pendamping sora nyambung deui.
errors.voiceConnecting: Nyambungkeun aman ka pasangan sora anjeun...
errors.microphone: Akses mikropon diperlukeun pikeun nelepon sora. Anjeun tiasa ngaktifkeunana dina Setélan, atanapi ngetik pesen.
errors.billing: Pangiring sora online samentawis teu sayogi. Anjeun tiasa neraskeun sareng pendamping offline.
errors.authentication: Pangiring sora teu tiasa pariksa sési ieu. Asup deui atanapi nganggo pendamping offline kanggo ayeuna.
errors.timeout: Pangiring sorana lila teuing pikeun ngaréspon. Pariksa sambungan anjeun sarta cobian deui.
errors.network: Kami henteu tiasa ngahontal pendamping sora. Pariksa sambungan anjeun, teras cobian deui atanapi teraskeun offline.
errors.genericVoice: Aya nu ngaganggu sauran sora. Cobian deui, atanapi teraskeun sareng pendamping offline.

ios.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: VeryLoving peryogi aksés mikropon pikeun kaamanan sareng AI telepon pendamping.
ios.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: VeryLoving nganggo lokasi anjeun pikeun peta kaamanan sareng fitur kaamanan caket dieu.
ios.NSBluetoothAlwaysUsageDescription: VeryLoving ngagunakeun Bluetooth pikeun nyambung ka NorthStar perhiasan kaamanan anjeun.
ios.NSCameraUsageDescription: VeryLoving uses the camera only to scan the one-time pairing QR code on your home robot.

releaseCritical.authUnavailable: Pilihan asup ieu teu sadia dina build ieu.
releaseCritical.demoModeNotice: Mode demo ngan ngagunakeun data palsu lokal. Ladenan nu disambungkeun teu diauténtikasi, sarta sési ieu direset nalika aplikasi dimuat deui.
releaseCritical.authCodeInvalid: Kode vérifikasi teu valid atawa geus kadaluwarsa. Pénta kode anyar teras cobian deui.
releaseCritical.authRateLimited: Loba teuing usaha asup. Antosan sakeudeung, teras cobian deui.
releaseCritical.authTimeout: Vérifikasi asup lila teuing. Pariksa konéksi anjeun teras cobian deui.
releaseCritical.authNetwork: Kami teu tiasa ngahubungi ladenan asup. Pariksa konéksi anjeun teras cobian deui.
releaseCritical.authSessionExpired: Sési anjeun geus kadaluwarsa. Asup deui.
releaseCritical.mapUnavailable: Peta kaamanan teu tiasa dimuat. Pariksa konéksi anjeun teras cobian deui.
releaseCritical.mapCachedLocation: Lokasi langsung teu sadia. Mintonkeun lokasi nu panungtungan disimpen ti %{capturedAt}.
releaseCritical.locationShareFailed: Kami teu tiasa ngabagikeun lokasi anjeun. Pariksa aksés lokasi teras cobian deui.
releaseCritical.locationShareCurrent: Ieu lokasi abdi nu dirékam dina %{capturedAt}:
releaseCritical.locationShareCached: Ieu lokasi abdi nu panungtungan disimpen, dirékam dina %{capturedAt}:
releaseCritical.blePermission: Aksés Bluetooth dipareuman. Aktipkeun dina Setélan, teras cobian deui.
releaseCritical.blePoweredOff: Bluetooth dipareuman. Hurungkeun, teras cobian deui.
releaseCritical.bleUnavailable: Pamasangan Bluetooth teu sadia dina alat atawa build ieu.
releaseCritical.bleScanFailed: Kami teu tiasa mendakan NorthStar. Simpen di deukeut anjeun, pariksa Bluetooth, teras cobian deui.
releaseCritical.bleNoDevices: Teu aya alat NorthStar di deukeut nu kapanggih. Simpen di deukeut anjeun teras scan deui.
releaseCritical.bleConnectFailed: Kami teu tiasa nyambung ka NorthStar. Pastikeun dicas jeung aya di deukeut, teras cobian deui.
releaseCritical.savePlaceFailed: Kami teu tiasa nyimpen tempat ieu. Cobian deui.
releaseCritical.sosDialerOpened: Panyambung telepon dibuka; telepon teu dikonfirmasi.
releaseCritical.sosCancelled: Dibatalkeun; teu aya telepon nu dilakukeun.
releaseCritical.sosContactRequired: Teu aya kontak darurat nu sadia; teu aya telepon nu dilakukeun.
releaseCritical.sosDialerFailed: Panyambung telepon teu tiasa dibuka; teu aya telepon nu dilakukeun.
releaseCritical.sosUnknown: Usaha SOS panungtungan teu tiasa dikonfirmasi.
releaseCritical.voiceConfiguration: Pendamping sora teu sadia ayeuna. Cobian deui engké atawa teruskeun jeung pendamping offline.

medicalProfile.title: Emergency medical profile
medicalProfile.subtitle: Information you choose to share during an SOS
medicalProfile.description: Keep this information current. VeryLoving attaches it only to a connected SOS after you enable sharing; it is not sent through the phone call itself.
medicalProfile.conditionsHint: Enter one per line or separate items with commas.
medicalProfile.allergiesHint: Enter one per line or separate items with commas.
medicalProfile.medicationsHint: Enter one per line: name | dose | instructions.
medicalProfile.emergencyNotesHint: Add details that may help your emergency contacts.
medicalProfile.shareLabel: Include this profile with connected SOS alerts
medicalProfile.shareHint: When enabled, reviewed details may be sent to your synchronized emergency flow.
medicalProfile.consentBody: Saving with sharing enabled records your consent and review time. You can turn sharing off or clear this profile at any time.
medicalProfile.saved: Medical profile saved and review time recorded.
medicalProfile.loadFailed: We could not load your medical profile. Try again.
medicalProfile.saveFailed: We could not save your medical profile. Check the entries and try again.
medicalProfile.clearFailed: We could not clear your medical profile. Try again.
medicalProfile.clearMessage: This removes the emergency medical information stored securely on this device.

medication.title: Medication reminders
medication.subtitle: Schedule home robot reminders and caregiver escalation.
medication.referenceHint: Use a short private schedule reference with letters, numbers, hyphens, or underscores.
medication.noRobot: Pair a home robot before adding medication reminders.
medication.escalationHint: Caregivers are alerted only if the reminder remains unacknowledged.
medication.saveFailed: We could not save this medication reminder. Check the entries and try again.
medication.loadFailed: We could not load medication reminders. Try again.
medication.acknowledgeFailed: We could not acknowledge this medication reminder. Try again.

wellness.title: Wellbeing & connected care
wellness.subtitle: Gentle activities, emotional check-ins, and coordinated device support.
wellness.connectedCareUnavailable: Connected care needs a signed-in account and the VeryLoving service. Local activities and mood history still work on this device.
wellness.scenarioFailed: Connected care could not start or update. Check your connection and try again.

cognitive.title: Cognitive engagement
cognitive.subtitle: Choose a light memory game, a trivia question, or a conversation prompt.
cognitive.connectedBody: Ask your home companion to start a gentle activity and follow its progress here.
cognitive.connectedHint: Starts the cognitive engagement scenario on your account-bound devices.
cognitive.activitySubtitle: There is no score to chase. Pick what feels comfortable today.
cognitive.emptyMessage: Memory, trivia, and conversation are ready whenever you are.

memory.title: Memory cards
memory.description: Notice three symbols, then recall the middle one.

trivia.title: Friendly trivia
trivia.description: Answer a familiar question at your own pace.

conversation.title: Conversation prompt
conversation.description: Use a warm prompt to recall and share a story.

memory.title: Remember the middle symbol
memory.instruction: Take a moment to look at this sequence.
memory.question: Which symbol was in the middle?
memory.incorrect: Good try. Take another look and go at your own pace.

trivia.title: Friendly trivia
trivia.incorrect: Not this time—and that is completely okay.

one.prompt: What color is a clear daytime sky?

two.prompt: What is the largest organ of the human body?

three.prompt: How many days are in a week?

prompts.one: What is a meal that brings back a happy memory?
prompts.two: Who taught you something you still use today?
prompts.three: What song always lifts your mood?
prompts.four: What is a place you would enjoy visiting again?

emotional.title: Emotional check-in
emotional.subtitle: Notice how you feel, save a short reflection, or invite your companion to talk.
emotional.moodQuestion: How are you feeling right now?
emotional.moodHint: Choose the closest answer. There is no wrong choice.
emotional.reflectionHint: Keep it brief. Raw voice audio and transcripts are not saved here.
emotional.reflectionPlaceholder: A few words about this moment...
emotional.privacyNote: Your mood history is account-bound, included in privacy export, and removed with account data deletion.
emotional.saveFailed: We could not save this check-in. Please try again.
emotional.connectedBody: Start a consent-aware Hume conversation through your home companion. A user-started check-in never invents a stress reading.
emotional.connectedHint: Starts an emotional check-in on your account-bound home companion.
emotional.historySubtitle: Only your last 90 private check-ins are retained on this device.
emotional.historyLoadFailed: We could not load your check-in history.
emotional.historyEmptyMessage: Choose a mood above when you are ready.
emotional.deleteMessage: This removes the mood and short reflection from this device.
emotional.deleteFailed: We could not delete this check-in. Please try again.
emotional.humeContextNotice: When you start reflection, your selected mood and optional summary are shared as temporary Hume context. They are not treated as a stress reading.

scenarios.title: Connected care scenarios
scenarios.subtitle: Coordinate your wearable and home companion with clear safety boundaries.
scenarios.connectedCareBody: VeryLoving resolves your paired devices on the server, prevents duplicate actions, and tracks every execution.
scenarios.demoOffline: Demo mode never creates a bearer token, so connected scenarios stay offline. Sign in with a real development account to test the server flow.
scenarios.signInRequired: Sign in again to use connected care scenarios.
scenarios.notConfigured: Connected care is not configured in this build.
scenarios.networkError: The connected care service could not be reached. Your wearable can still work over Bluetooth.
scenarios.stillRunning: This scenario is still running. Refresh its status shortly.
scenarios.genericError: The connected care action could not be completed. Please retry.
scenarios.chooseActionBody: Actions with safety consequences always explain what will happen before they start.

descriptions.fall_detection: Run an analytics-only practice. It never moves a robot or alerts a contact.
descriptions.medication_adherence: Ask the robot to remind you now; unconfirmed reminders can escalate to a caregiver.
descriptions.emotional_check_in: Invite a calming, consent-aware Hume conversation.
descriptions.cognitive_engagement: Invite a gentle robot activity and voice game.
descriptions.ai_angel_auto_dial: Start the confirmed cross-device emergency flow.

confirmations.practiceBody: This records a practice event only. It will not move the robot, call anyone, or send an emergency alert.
confirmations.medicationBody: The robot will remind you now. If you do not confirm within the adherence window, the configured caregiver escalation can run.
confirmations.emergencyBody: This starts the real emergency workflow across your paired devices and may contact your configured emergency contact.
confirmations.cancelCriticalBody: Stopping a critical scenario can end active emergency steps. Continue only if you are sure help is no longer needed.

scenarios.wellnessToolsBody: Check in privately or choose an activity before involving connected devices.
scenarios.recentActivityBody: Status is encrypted, account-bound, and refreshed while work is active.
scenarios.emptyMessage: Start a wellbeing check-in or another quick action when you are ready.
scenarios.started: Scenario accepted. Live status is updating.
scenarios.fallbackNote: A planned fallback completed because a preferred step was unavailable.
scenarios.failedNote: The scenario could not finish. Check device connectivity and try again if it is safe.

feedback.title: Was this helpful?
feedback.message: Tell us whether %{interaction} supported you. We save only the rating, not a free-text response.
feedback.helpfulHint: Records a thumbs-up rating for this completed interaction.
feedback.notHelpfulHint: Records a thumbs-down rating for this completed interaction.
feedback.error: We could not save your rating. Please try again.
